ddls:
CREATE TABLE "go_terms" (
  "go_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each Gene Ontology term */,
  "term" TEXT /* Name of the Gene Ontology term */,
  "definition" TEXT /* Detailed definition of the term */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the GO term (biological process, molecular function, cellular component) */,
  "obsolete" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the term is obsolete */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the term was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date the term was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation record */,
  "go_id" TEXT /* Reference to the Gene Ontology term */,
  "annotated" INTEGER /* Number of times the term is annotated in the dataset */,
  "significant" INTEGER /* Number of significant annotations */,
  "expected" REAL /* Expected count of annotations based on statistical analysis */,
  "fisher" REAL /* Fisher's exact test score for the significance of annotations */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value for the significance of annotations */,
  "q_value" REAL /* Q-value (false discovery rate) for the significance of annotations */,
  "source_dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset from which the annotation was derived */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date the annotation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_go_id FOREIGN KEY ("go_id") REFERENCES go_terms ("go_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the dataset */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species the dataset is related to */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., RNA-seq, ChIP-seq) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FASTQ, BAM) */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata about the dataset (e.g., experimental conditions, protocols) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_annotations" (
  "dataset_annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a dataset and an annotation */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., gene, pathway) */,
  "annotation_quality" REAL /* Quality score for the annotation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_annotations_annotation_id FOREIGN KEY ("annotation_id") REFERENCES annotations ("annotation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role associated with the permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., dataset, platform) */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the permission is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the relationship between a user and a permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the permission is active for the user */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset that was analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "analysis_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the analysis in seconds */,
  "analysis_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset visualized */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., network graph, heatmap) */,
  "configuration" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the visualization */,
  "visualization_status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "visualization_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visualization generation in seconds */,
  "visualization_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user involved in the collaboration */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the permission level for the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, pending, rejected) */,
  "collaboration_start_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration started */,
  "collaboration_end_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration ended */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of a dataset */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes in this version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "version_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the version was the current version */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who provided the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the dataset */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment provided in the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was submitted */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., peer review, community review) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset that triggered the alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who should receive the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., new version, review) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., read, unread) */,
  "alert_priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
